parameters.name: search_station
parameters.description: Search for a German public transit stop by name (nationwide ÖPNV: S-Bahn, U-Bahn, Tram, Bus, regional). Returns stop names and IDs. Parameter: query (stop name to search for, e.g. 'München Hauptbahnhof')

parameters.name: get_departures
parameters.description: Get upcoming departures from a German public transit stop (nationwide ÖPNV). Accepts stop name (auto-resolved) or EFA ID. Parameters: station (stop name or ID, e.g. 'Essen Hbf'), results (optional, number of departures, default 10)

parameters.name: get_arrivals
parameters.description: Get upcoming arrivals at a German public transit stop (nationwide ÖPNV). Accepts stop name (auto-resolved) or EFA ID. Parameters: station (stop name or ID, e.g. 'Hamburg Hbf'), results (optional, number of arrivals, default 10)

parameters.name: search_journey
parameters.description: Search for German public transit connections between two stops (nationwide ÖPNV: includes S/U/Tram/Bus/regional). Accepts stop names (auto-resolved) or EFA IDs. Parameters: from (origin, e.g. 'Essen Hbf'), to (destination, e.g. 'Köln Hbf'), departure (optional, ISO 8601 datetime), results (optional, number of connections, default 3)
